title: Higher
lyrics:
[¥ellow Bucks「Higher ft. YZERR」歌詞]

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Say you wanna roll up ay
Say you wanna roll up ay
Let's get higher higher
Higher higher higher higher High
Say you wanna roll up ay
Say you wanna roll up ay
Let's get higher higher
Higher higher higher higher High
Do you wanna get high
High like me

[Verse 1: ¥ellow Bucks]
ぶっ飛んでんのは生まれつき
Higher higher higher higher
Higher higher high
金のなる木の栽培人
根を張る名古屋と川崎
Higher higher higher higher
Take it to the top
煙とバカは上に上がる
このご時世に自力でバブル
遠慮はいい Try my shit
YZERRとMake it rainする話

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Say you wanna roll up ay
Say you wanna roll up ay
Let's get higher higher
Higher higher higher higher High
Say you wanna roll up ay
Say you wanna roll up ay
Let's get higher higher
Higher higher higher higher High

[Verse 2: YZERR]
Let's get higher higher
首にはダイヤで
時間がないから燃やしたタイマー
気の合う仲間と耕す会社
10億じゃ売らねえいくらで売却？
わやわや
Bucks & YZERR
1 Shot 2 Shot
打ち込みFire
誰がリタイアで気にしね外野
10年後に決めよう勝者か敗者
お金に変えるぜ昔のPain
ネタなら安くは売らないぜ
まだまだVerseなら足りないぜ
なあそうだろ？To The Top Gang

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]

Say you wanna roll up ay
Let's get higher higher
Higher higher higher higher High

Say you wanna roll up ay
